name: Visa Inc.
description: Visa Inc. is a world leader in digital payments, facilitating secure and efficient financial transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions, and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories. Headquartered in San Francisco, California, the company operates a global payment network that enables the movement of funds through branded credit, debit, and prepaid cards. By connecting diverse participants in the global economy, Visa plays a critical role in modern commerce, driving innovation in financial technology and providing the infrastructure necessary for digital payments to function seamlessly on a worldwide scale.
